description: Compute AU content and positional context score around a miRNA target site within an mRNA.

targetStart.description: 0-based inclusive start of the target site

targetEnd.description: 0-based inclusive end of the target site

contextWindow.description: Flanking context window (nt) on each side of the site

auContent.description: Fraction of A/U bases in the context window (0-1)

nearStart.description: True if the site starts within the first 15% of the transcript

nearEnd.description: True if the site ends within the last 15% of the transcript

contextScore.description: Favourability score in [0,1]: 0.5*auContent + 0.3 mid-transcript bonus, capped at 1

errors.message: mRNA sequence cannot be null or empty
Target indices are out of range for the sequence
